content: The 2018 Nobel Prize in Chemistry was awarded to Frances Arnold, George Smith, and Gregory Winter for their work on directed evolution of enzymes and phage display of peptides and antibodies. Arnold was recognized for her pioneering work in protein engineering, while Smith and Winter were honored for their contributions to using bacteriophage viruses to evolve new proteins.
